name: Magos' archive — STC fragments

tracer.label: MACHINE-SPIRIT
tracer.evaded: rites of concealment accepted. the machine-spirit relents.

motd: the flesh is weak. the machine is eternal.
knowledge is power — guard it well.

litany: from the moment i understood the weakness of my flesh,
it disgusted me. i craved the strength and certainty of steel.
i aspired to the purity of the blessed machine.
bless: ++ may it serve a thousand more years. ++
